title: Debiāpur Heat Wave
lead: Debiāpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.89. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Debiāpur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, and the wind speed is 11.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of precipitation and high temperatures are expected to continue, posing significant risks to the population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Debiāpur
